title: Day 8 Speaking Drill — Will Have (Future Perfect)
instructions: हर sentence को ज़ोर से बोलें। Pronunciation tips follow करें। Contractions पर ध्यान दें — I'll have, she'll have, we'll have, they'll have। हर drill को कम से कम 3 बार repeat करें।

drills.title: Basic Future Perfect — By Tomorrow
drills.instructions: इन sentences को ज़ोर से पढ़ें। 'will have' पर stress दें।

sentences.english: By tomorrow, I will have finished the report.
sentences.hindi: कल तक, मैं report खत्म कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By to-MOR-row, I will have FIN-ished the re-PORT.

sentences.english: By tomorrow, she will have cooked dinner.
sentences.hindi: कल तक, वह खाना बना चुकी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By to-MOR-row, she will have COOKED DIN-ner.

sentences.english: By tomorrow, we will have packed our bags.
sentences.hindi: कल तक, हम अपने bags पैक कर चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By to-MOR-row, we will have PACKED our BAGS.

sentences.english: By tomorrow morning, he will have left for the airport.
sentences.hindi: कल सुबह तक, वह airport के लिए निकल चुका होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By to-MOR-row MOR-ning, he will have LEFT for the AIR-port.

sentences.english: By tomorrow evening, they will have reached Mumbai.
sentences.hindi: कल शाम तक, वे Mumbai पहुँच चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By to-MOR-row EEV-ning, they will have REACHED Mum-BAI.

drills.practiceNotes: By tomorrow के साथ Future Perfect सबसे common है। Morning/Evening जोड़ने से time specific होता है।

drills.title: Basic Future Perfect — By Tonight / By This Evening
drills.instructions: आज रात और शाम के समय के साथ practice करें।

sentences.english: By tonight, I will have submitted the assignment.
sentences.hindi: आज रात तक, मैं assignment submit कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By to-NIGHT, I will have sub-MIT-ted the a-SIGN-ment.

sentences.english: By tonight, she will have called her parents.
sentences.hindi: आज रात तक, उसने अपने parents को call कर लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By to-NIGHT, she will have CALLED her PAR-ents.

sentences.english: By this evening, the doctor will have seen all the patients.
sentences.hindi: आज शाम तक, doctor सभी patients को देख चुका होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By this EEV-ning, the DOC-tor will have SEEN all the PAY-shents.

sentences.english: By tonight, we will have watched the entire series.
sentences.hindi: आज रात तक, हम पूरी series देख चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By to-NIGHT, we will have WATCHED the en-TIRE SEE-rees.

sentences.english: By this evening, the chef will have prepared the menu.
sentences.hindi: आज शाम तक, chef menu तैयार कर चुका होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By this EEV-ning, the CHEF will have pre-PAIRED the MEN-you.

drills.practiceNotes: Tonight और this evening — daily life में बहुत उपयोगी expressions।

drills.title: Basic Future Perfect — By Next Week / Next Month
drills.instructions: Longer time expressions के साथ practice करें।

sentences.english: By next week, I will have completed the project.
sentences.hindi: अगले हफ्ते तक, मैं project पूरा कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By NEXT week, I will have com-PLEE-ted the PRO-ject.

sentences.english: By next month, she will have saved enough money.
sentences.hindi: अगले महीने तक, उसने पर्याप्त पैसे बचा लिए होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By NEXT month, she will have SAVED e-NUFF MU-nee.

sentences.english: By next year, he will have learned advanced Excel.
sentences.hindi: अगले साल तक, उसने advanced Excel सीख लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By NEXT year, he will have LURND ad-VANST EX-sel.

sentences.english: By next Monday, the team will have reviewed the proposal.
sentences.hindi: अगले सोमवार तक, team proposal review कर चुकी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By NEXT MUN-day, the TEEM will have re-VYOOD the pro-POH-zal.

sentences.english: By next quarter, we will have exceeded our sales target.
sentences.hindi: अगले quarter तक, हम अपना sales target पार कर चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By NEXT KWOR-ter, we will have ex-SEED-ed our SAELZ TAR-get.

drills.practiceNotes: Next week/month/year — planning conversations में सबसे ज़्यादा use होते हैं।

drills.title: Basic Future Perfect — Specific Times (By 5 PM, By 10 AM)
drills.instructions: Clock times के साथ Future Perfect बोलें।

sentences.english: By 5 PM, I will have finished all my tasks.
sentences.hindi: शाम 5 बजे तक, मैं अपने सभी tasks खत्म कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By FIVE PEE-EM, I will have FIN-isht all my TASKS.
sentences.tip: 5 PM = FIVE PEE EM — letters spell out करें

sentences.english: By 9 AM, the office will have opened.
sentences.hindi: सुबह 9 बजे तक, office खुल चुका होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By NINE AY-EM, the OF-fis will have OH-pend.

sentences.english: By 3 o'clock, the meeting will have started.
sentences.hindi: 3 बजे तक, meeting शुरू हो चुकी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By THREE O-clock, the MEET-ing will have STAR-ted.

sentences.english: By midnight, they will have celebrated the new year.
sentences.hindi: आधी रात तक, उन्होंने New Year celebrate कर लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By MID-night, they will have SEL-e-bray-ted the NEW YEAR.

sentences.english: By noon, she will have delivered the presentation.
sentences.hindi: दोपहर तक, उसने presentation दे दी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By NOON, she will have de-LIV-erd the prez-en-TAY-shun.

drills.practiceNotes: Specific time expressions professional settings में बहुत important हैं।

drills.title: Negative Future Perfect — Won't Have (Part 1)
drills.instructions: Negative sentences बोलें। 'won't have' को smooth बोलें — WONT-uhv।

sentences.english: By tomorrow, I won't have finished the book.
sentences.hindi: कल तक, मैं किताब खत्म नहीं कर पाऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By to-MOR-row, I WONT have FIN-isht the BOOK.
sentences.tip: won't = will not का short form

sentences.english: By Friday, she won't have received the package.
sentences.hindi: शुक्रवार तक, उसे package नहीं मिला होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By FRY-day, she WONT have re-SEEVD the PAK-ij.

sentences.english: By next year, he won't have paid off his loan.
sentences.hindi: अगले साल तक, उसने loan नहीं चुकाया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By NEXT year, he WONT have PAID off his LONE.
sentences.tip: paid off = एक phrase — together बोलें

sentences.english: By Monday, they won't have made a decision.
sentences.hindi: सोमवार तक, उन्होंने कोई decision नहीं लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By MUN-day, they WONT have MADE a de-SI-zhun.

sentences.english: By the deadline, she won't have completed the training.
sentences.hindi: Deadline तक, उसने training पूरी नहीं की होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By the DEED-line, she WONT have com-PLEE-ted the TRAY-ning.

drills.practiceNotes: Won't have = will not have। Negative Future Perfect बताता है कि कोई काम future point तक नहीं होगा।

drills.title: Negative Future Perfect — Won't Have (Part 2)
drills.instructions: और negative sentences practice करें।

sentences.english: By 2025, we won't have launched the new product.
sentences.hindi: 2025 तक, हमने नया product launch नहीं किया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By TWO-thou-zand-TWEN-tee-five, we WONT have LAUNCHD the NEW PRO-dukt.

sentences.english: By the time he arrives, I won't have prepared dinner.
sentences.hindi: उसके आने तक, मैंने खाना तैयार नहीं किया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME he ar-RIVE-z, I WONT have pre-PAIRD DIN-ner.
sentences.tip: 'By the time' clause — very important structure

sentences.english: She won't have recovered from the illness by Friday.
sentences.hindi: शुक्रवार तक वह बीमारी से ठीक नहीं हो पाएगी।
sentences.pronunciation: She WONT have re-CUV-erd from the IL-nes by FRY-day.

sentences.english: By next month, I won't have saved enough for the trip.
sentences.hindi: अगले महीने तक, मैंने trip के लिए पर्याप्त नहीं बचाया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By NEXT munth, I WONT have SAVED e-NUFF for the TRIP.

sentences.english: By tonight, he won't have replied to all the emails.
sentences.hindi: आज रात तक, उसने सभी emails का जवाब नहीं दिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By to-NIGHT, he WONT have re-PLIED to all the EE-mailz.

drills.practiceNotes: Negative Future Perfect का use करके आप clearly बता सकते हैं कि कोई goal achieve नहीं होगा।

drills.title: Question Form — Will You Have? (Part 1)
drills.instructions: Questions rising intonation के साथ बोलें — आवाज़ ऊपर जाए।

sentences.english: Will you have finished the report by 5 PM?
sentences.hindi: क्या आप शाम 5 बजे तक report खत्म कर लेंगे?
sentences.pronunciation: Will you have FIN-isht the re-PORT by FIVE PEE-EM?
sentences.tip: Question में आवाज़ end में ऊपर जाए ↗

sentences.english: Will she have arrived by the time we start?
sentences.hindi: क्या जब हम शुरू करें तब तक वह पहुँच जाएगी?
sentences.pronunciation: Will she have ar-RIVED by the TIME we START?

sentences.english: Will they have completed the project by Friday?
sentences.hindi: क्या वे शुक्रवार तक project पूरा कर लेंगे?
sentences.pronunciation: Will they have com-PLEE-ted the PRO-ject by FRY-day?

sentences.english: Will he have gotten the promotion by next year?
sentences.hindi: क्या उसे अगले साल तक promotion मिल जाएगी?
sentences.pronunciation: Will he have GOT-ten the pro-MOH-shun by NEXT year?
sentences.tip: gotten = American English; got = British English

sentences.english: Will you have saved enough money by December?
sentences.hindi: क्या आपने December तक पर्याप्त पैसे बचाए होंगे?
sentences.pronunciation: Will you have SAVED e-NUFF MU-nee by de-SEM-ber?

drills.practiceNotes: Questions में Will सबसे पहले आता है: Will + Subject + have + V3?

drills.title: Question Form — Will You Have? (Part 2)
drills.instructions: More question forms — intonation पर focus करें।

sentences.english: Will you have submitted the assignment before the deadline?
sentences.hindi: क्या आपने deadline से पहले assignment submit कर दी होगी?
sentences.pronunciation: Will you have sub-MIT-ted the a-SIGN-ment be-FORE the DEED-line?

sentences.english: Will the team have finalized the design by Wednesday?
sentences.hindi: क्या team बुधवार तक design finalize कर लेगी?
sentences.pronunciation: Will the TEEM have FY-nal-ized the de-ZINE by WENZ-day?

sentences.english: Will you have learned to drive by next month?
sentences.hindi: क्या अगले महीने तक आपने गाड़ी चलाना सीख लिया होगा?
sentences.pronunciation: Will you have LURND to DRIVE by NEXT munth?

sentences.english: Will she have gotten married by 2026?
sentences.hindi: क्या 2026 तक उसकी शादी हो जाएगी?
sentences.pronunciation: Will she have GOT-ten MAR-reed by TWO-O-TWO-SIX?

sentences.english: Will they have built the new factory by next year?
sentences.hindi: क्या अगले साल तक उन्होंने नई factory बना ली होगी?
sentences.pronunciation: Will they have BILT the NEW FAK-tree by NEXT year?

drills.practiceNotes: Will + subject + have + V3 — यही Future Perfect question का formula है।

drills.title: Professional — Committing to a Deadline
drills.instructions: Office में किसी को deadline confirm करते हुए बोलें। Confident tone रखें।

sentences.english: By Friday, I will have completed the testing phase.
sentences.hindi: Friday तक, मैं testing phase पूरा कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By FRY-day, I will have com-PLEE-ted the TEST-ing FAYZ.

sentences.english: By our next meeting, I will have reviewed all the documents.
sentences.hindi: हमारी अगली meeting तक, मैं सभी documents review कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By our NEXT MEET-ing, I will have re-VYOOD all the DOK-yu-ments.

sentences.english: By Monday, the team will have implemented all the changes.
sentences.hindi: Monday तक, team सभी changes implement कर चुकी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By MUN-day, the TEEM will have im-pleh-MENT-ed all the CHANJ-ez.

sentences.english: By the end of this sprint, we will have fixed all the bugs.
sentences.hindi: इस sprint के अंत तक, हम सभी bugs fix कर चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By the END of this SPRINT, we will have FIKST all the BUGZ.

sentences.english: By Q3, our company will have reached the revenue target.
sentences.hindi: Q3 तक, हमारी company revenue target हासिल कर चुकी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By KYOO-THREE, our KUM-puh-nee will have REECHED the REV-eh-nyoo TAR-get.

drills.practiceNotes: Office में deadlines commit करते समय Future Perfect use करें। Confidence दिखाता है।

drills.title: Professional — Project Status Update
drills.instructions: Team meeting में project status बताएं।

sentences.english: By tomorrow, I will have sent the updated report to the client.
sentences.hindi: कल तक, मैं client को updated report भेज चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By to-MOR-row, I will have SENT the up-DAY-ted re-PORT to the CLI-ent.

sentences.english: By the deadline, we will have deployed the new version.
sentences.hindi: Deadline तक, हम नया version deploy कर चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By the DEED-line, we will have de-PLOYD the NEW VUR-zhun.

sentences.english: By the time you review this, I will have made the corrections.
sentences.hindi: जब तक आप इसे review करें, मैं corrections कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME you re-VYOO this, I will have MADE the ku-REK-shunz.
sentences.tip: 'By the time you...' — very useful clause

sentences.english: By Thursday, the QA team will have finished testing.
sentences.hindi: गुरुवार तक, QA team testing खत्म कर चुकी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By THURZ-day, the KYOO-AY TEEM will have FIN-isht TEST-ing.

sentences.english: By our standup tomorrow, I will have resolved the issue.
sentences.hindi: कल के standup तक, मैंने issue resolve कर लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By our STAN-dup to-MOR-row, I will have re-ZOLVD the ISH-yoo.

drills.practiceNotes: Professional status updates में Future Perfect bhi काम आता है।

drills.title: Interview English — Future Plans (Part 1)
drills.instructions: Job interview में future plans बताएं। Confident और professional tone।

sentences.english: By the time I join, I will have completed my certification.
sentences.hindi: Join करने तक, मैं अपना certification पूरा कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME I JOIN, I will have com-PLEE-ted my sur-tif-ih-KAY-shun.

sentences.english: By next year, I will have gained 3 years of experience.
sentences.hindi: अगले साल तक, मुझे 3 साल का experience हो जाएगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By NEXT year, I will have GAIND THREE years of ex-PEER-ee-ens.

sentences.english: By the end of this course, I will have mastered Python.
sentences.hindi: इस course के अंत तक, मैंने Python master कर लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By the END of this KORSE, I will have MAS-terd PY-thon.

sentences.english: By the time this project ends, I will have led a team of 10.
sentences.hindi: इस project के अंत तक, मैं 10 लोगों की team lead कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME this PRO-ject ENDZ, I will have LED a TEEM of TEN.

sentences.english: By 2025, I will have completed my MBA from a top institute.
sentences.hindi: 2025 तक, मैंने top institute से MBA पूरा कर लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By TWO-O-TWEN-tee-FIVE, I will have com-PLEE-ted my EM-BEE-AY from a TOP IN-stih-tyoot.

drills.practiceNotes: Interview में Future Perfect से आप दिखाते हैं कि आपने future planning की है।

drills.title: Interview English — Future Plans (Part 2)
drills.instructions: 5-year plan questions के जवाब दें।

sentences.english: In five years, I will have become a senior software engineer.
sentences.hindi: 5 सालों में, मैं senior software engineer बन चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: In FIVE years, I will have be-CUM a SEEN-yor SOFT-wair en-jih-NEER.

sentences.english: By the time I reach 30, I will have managed large-scale projects.
sentences.hindi: 30 की उम्र तक, मैंने large-scale projects manage कर लिए होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME I REECH THUR-tee, I will have MAN-ijd LARJ-SKAYL PRO-jekts.

sentences.english: By the end of this year, I will have earned my AWS certification.
sentences.hindi: इस साल के अंत तक, मैंने AWS certification हासिल कर ली होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By the END of this YEAR, I will have URND my AY-DUB-el-yoo-ESS sur-tif-ih-KAY-shun.

sentences.english: Within 3 years of joining, I will have built a strong professional network.
sentences.hindi: Join करने के 3 साल के भीतर, मैंने strong professional network बना लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: With-IN THREE years of JOIN-ing, I will have BILT a STRONG pro-FESH-uh-nul NET-wurk.

sentences.english: By then, I will have contributed to at least 5 successful product launches.
sentences.hindi: तब तक, मैं कम से कम 5 successful product launches में contribute कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By THEN, I will have kon-TRIB-yoo-tid to at LEEST FIVE suk-SES-ful PRO-dukt LAUN-chez.

drills.practiceNotes: 5-year plan में Future Perfect बहुत impressive लगता है — preparation और planning दिखाता है।

drills.title: Life Goals — By Age Milestones
drills.instructions: Age-based life goals बोलें — dreams और aspirations।

sentences.english: By the age of 25, I will have started my own startup.
sentences.hindi: 25 साल की उम्र तक, मैंने अपना startup शुरू कर लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By the AYJ of TWEN-tee-FIVE, I will have STAR-tid my OWN START-up.

sentences.english: By the age of 30, I will have bought my dream house.
sentences.hindi: 30 साल की उम्र तक, मैंने अपना dream house खरीद लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By the AYJ of THUR-tee, I will have BAWT my DREEM HOWS.

sentences.english: By 35, I will have traveled to at least 20 countries.
sentences.hindi: 35 तक, मैं कम से कम 20 देशों में travel कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By THUR-tee-FIVE, I will have TRAV-eld to at LEEST TWEN-tee KUN-treez.

sentences.english: By 40, I will have built a successful business.
sentences.hindi: 40 तक, मैंने एक successful business बना लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By FOR-tee, I will have BILT a suk-SES-ful BIZ-nes.

sentences.english: By 2030, I will have achieved financial freedom.
sentences.hindi: 2030 तक, मैंने financial freedom हासिल कर ली होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By TWO-O-THUR-tee, I will have uh-CHEEVD fy-NAN-shul FREE-dum.

drills.practiceNotes: Life goals express करने के लिए 'By the age of...' और 'By [year]...' बहुत useful हैं।

drills.title: Life Goals — Long-term Dreams
drills.instructions: Long-term future goals बड़े confidence से बोलें।

sentences.english: By 2030, I will have written and published my first novel.
sentences.hindi: 2030 तक, मैंने अपना पहला novel लिखकर publish कर दिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By TWO-O-THUR-tee, I will have RIT-ten and PUB-lishd my FURST NOV-ul.
sentences.tip: written = RIT-ten (write का V3), published = PUB-lisht

sentences.english: By the time I retire, I will have mentored hundreds of young professionals.
sentences.hindi: Retire होने तक, मैंने सैकड़ों young professionals को mentor किया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME I re-TIRE, I will have MEN-tord HUN-dredz of YUNG pro-FESH-uh-nulz.

sentences.english: By 2035, our company will have expanded to 10 countries.
sentences.hindi: 2035 तक, हमारी company 10 देशों में expand कर चुकी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By TWO-O-THUR-tee-FIVE, our KUM-puh-nee will have ex-PAN-did to TEN KUN-treez.

sentences.english: By the time my children grow up, I will have set a good example.
sentences.hindi: मेरे बच्चों के बड़े होने तक, मैंने एक अच्छा example set किया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME my CHIL-dren GROH up, I will have SET a GOOD ex-AM-pul.
sentences.tip: 'By the time' clause with personal context

sentences.english: By 2040, humanity will have found solutions to climate change.
sentences.hindi: 2040 तक, मानवता climate change के solutions खोज चुकी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By TWO-O-FOR-tee, hyoo-MAN-ih-tee will have FOUND so-LOO-shunz to KLY-mit CHANJ.

drills.practiceNotes: बड़े dreams को Future Perfect में express करना आपकी aspirations को clear करता है।

drills.title: Contractions — I'll Have, She'll Have, We'll Have
drills.instructions: Contractions को smooth और natural बोलें। I will have → I'll have।

sentences.english: I'll have finished by tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: मैं कल तक खत्म कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: I-ull have FIN-isht by to-MOR-row.
sentences.tip: I'll have = 'eye-ul-uhv' — very smooth, natural sound

sentences.english: She'll have arrived by then.
sentences.hindi: वह तब तक पहुँच चुकी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: Sheel have ar-RIVED by THEN.

sentences.english: We'll have completed the work by Monday.
sentences.hindi: हम सोमवार तक काम पूरा कर चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: Weel have com-PLEE-tid the WURK by MUN-day.

sentences.english: They'll have left before you arrive.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हारे आने से पहले वे जा चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: Theyl have LEFT be-FORE you ar-RIVE.

sentences.english: He'll have eaten by the time you reach.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हारे पहुँचने तक वह खाना खा चुका होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: Heel have EE-ten by the TIME you REECH.

drills.practiceNotes: Contractions use करने से आप more natural और fluent सुनते हैं। Native speakers हमेशा contractions use करते हैं।

drills.title: Contractions — You'll Have, It'll Have, They'll Have
drills.instructions: More contractions practice — especially 'it'll have' and 'you'll have'।

sentences.english: You'll have understood by the end of this lesson.
sentences.hindi: इस lesson के अंत तक आप समझ चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: Yool have un-dur-STOOD by the END of this LES-un.

sentences.english: It'll have stopped raining by morning.
sentences.hindi: सुबह तक बारिश रुक चुकी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: IT-ul have STOPT RAYN-ing by MOR-ning.
sentences.tip: It'll = IT-ul — can also say 'it will'

sentences.english: By the time we arrive, they'll have already started.
sentences.hindi: हमारे पहुँचने तक, वे शुरू कर चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME we ar-RIVE, theyl have ALL-red-ee STAR-tid.

sentences.english: You'll have learned so much by the end of this course.
sentences.hindi: इस course के अंत तक आपने बहुत कुछ सीख लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: Yool have LURND so MUCH by the END of this KORSE.

sentences.english: By next year, I'll have moved to a bigger city.
sentences.hindi: अगले साल तक, मैं एक बड़े शहर में shift हो चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By NEXT year, I-ul have MOOVD to a BIG-er SIT-ee.

drills.practiceNotes: It'll, you'll, they'll — ये contractions daily conversation में बहुत आते हैं।

drills.title: Transformation — Simple Future to Future Perfect
drills.instructions: Simple Future (will + V1) को Future Perfect (will have + V3) में बदलें।

sentences.english: Simple: I will finish the work. → Future Perfect: By 5 PM, I will have finished the work.
sentences.hindi: Simple: मैं काम खत्म करूँगा। → FP: शाम 5 बजे तक, मैं काम खत्म कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By FIVE PEE-EM, I will have FIN-isht the WURK.
sentences.tip: will finish → will have finished। Time expression add करें।

sentences.english: Simple: She will submit the report. → Future Perfect: By Friday, she will have submitted the report.
sentences.hindi: Simple: वह report submit करेगी। → FP: Friday तक, उसने report submit कर दी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By FRY-day, she will have sub-MIT-tid the re-PORT.

sentences.english: Simple: They will complete the project. → Future Perfect: By next month, they will have completed the project.
sentences.hindi: Simple: वे project complete करेंगे। → FP: अगले महीने तक, वे project complete कर चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By NEXT munth, they will have com-PLEE-tid the PRO-jekt.

sentences.english: Simple: He will travel to 5 countries. → Future Perfect: By 2026, he will have traveled to 5 countries.
sentences.hindi: Simple: वह 5 देशों में travel करेगा। → FP: 2026 तक, वह 5 देशों में travel कर चुका होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By TWO-O-TWEN-tee-SIX, he will have TRAV-eld to FIVE KUN-treez.

sentences.english: Simple: We will save money. → Future Perfect: By December, we will have saved enough money.
sentences.hindi: Simple: हम पैसे बचाएंगे। → FP: December तक, हमने पर्याप्त पैसे बचा लिए होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By de-SEM-ber, we will have SAVED e-NUFF MUN-ee.

drills.practiceNotes: Simple Future → Future Perfect transformation: will + V1 → will have + V3। Time expression add करना ज़रूरी है।

drills.title: Transformation — Present Perfect to Future Perfect
drills.instructions: Present Perfect sentences को Future Perfect में transform करें।

sentences.english: Present Perfect: I have completed the course. → Future Perfect: By June, I will have completed the course.
sentences.hindi: Present Perfect: मैंने course पूरा कर लिया है। → FP: June तक, मैंने course पूरा कर लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By JOON, I will have com-PLEE-tid the KORSE.
sentences.tip: have completed → will have completed। Time shift करें।

sentences.english: Present Perfect: She has written 3 novels. → Future Perfect: By 2030, she will have written 10 novels.
sentences.hindi: Present Perfect: उसने 3 novels लिखे हैं। → FP: 2030 तक, उसने 10 novels लिख लिए होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By TWO-O-THUR-tee, she will have RIT-ten TEN NOV-ulz.

sentences.english: Present Perfect: They have launched 2 products. → Future Perfect: By Q4, they will have launched 5 products.
sentences.hindi: Present Perfect: उन्होंने 2 products launch किए हैं। → FP: Q4 तक, उन्होंने 5 products launch किए होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By KYOO-FOR, they will have LAUNCHD FIVE PRO-dukts.

sentences.english: Present Perfect: He has saved 50,000 rupees. → Future Perfect: By December, he will have saved 1 lakh rupees.
sentences.hindi: Present Perfect: उसने 50,000 रुपये बचाए हैं। → FP: December तक, उसने 1 lakh रुपये बचाए होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By de-SEM-ber, he will have SAVED ONE LAKH ROO-peez.

sentences.english: Present Perfect: We have hired 5 employees. → Future Perfect: By next year, we will have hired 50 employees.
sentences.hindi: Present Perfect: हमने 5 employees hire किए हैं। → FP: अगले साल तक, हमने 50 employees hire किए होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By NEXT year, we will have HIRED FIF-tee em-PLOY-eez.

drills.practiceNotes: Present Perfect और Future Perfect के बीच का difference — time reference बदलता है।

drills.title: Roleplay — Project Manager Confirms Deadline with Team
drills.instructions: PM की role play करें। Team को deadline confirm करें।

sentences.english: Team, by Friday, we will have completed all three phases of the project.
sentences.hindi: Team, Friday तक, हम project के तीनों phases पूरे कर चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: TEEM, by FRY-day, we will have com-PLEE-tid ALL THREE FAY-ziz of the PRO-jekt.

sentences.english: By our Monday standup, I will have reviewed everyone's code.
sentences.hindi: Monday के standup तक, मैं सभी का code review कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By our MUN-day STAN-dup, I will have re-VYOOD EV-ree-wunz KOHD.

sentences.english: By the time the client calls, we will have prepared the demo.
sentences.hindi: Client के call करने तक, हम demo तैयार कर चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME the CLI-ent KAWLZ, we will have pre-PAIRD the DEM-oh.

sentences.english: Will the team have fixed the critical bugs by Wednesday?
sentences.hindi: क्या team बुधवार तक critical bugs fix कर लेगी?
sentences.pronunciation: Will the TEEM have FIKST the KRIT-ih-kul BUGZ by WENZ-day?

sentences.english: By the deadline, we will have delivered a product that exceeds expectations.
sentences.hindi: Deadline तक, हम एक ऐसा product deliver करेंगे जो expectations से बेहतर हो।
sentences.pronunciation: By the DEED-line, we will have de-LIV-erd a PRO-dukt that ex-SEEDZ ex-pek-TAY-shunz.

drills.practiceNotes: Project Manager roleplay — confidence, clarity, और commitment दिखाएं।

drills.title: Roleplay — Team Member Responds to PM
drills.instructions: Team member की role play करें — PM के सवालों का जवाब दें।

sentences.english: Yes, by Friday, I will have completed the backend API.
sentences.hindi: हाँ, Friday तक, मैं backend API पूरी कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: YES, by FRY-day, I will have com-PLEE-tid the BACK-end AY-PEE-EYE.

sentences.english: I promise, by Monday, I will have resolved all the issues.
sentences.hindi: मैं वादा करता हूँ, Monday तक, मैं सभी issues resolve कर दूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: I PROM-is, by MUN-day, I will have re-ZOLVD ALL the ISH-yooz.

sentences.english: By the time you need the report, I will have already sent it.
sentences.hindi: जब आपको report चाहिए होगी, मैं उसे पहले ही भेज चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME you NEED the re-PORT, I will have ALL-red-ee SENT it.

sentences.english: Don't worry. By tomorrow morning, the bug will have been fixed.
sentences.hindi: चिंता मत करो। कल सुबह तक, bug fix हो चुका होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: DONT WUR-ee. By to-MOR-row MOR-ning, the BUG will have been FIKST.
sentences.tip: Passive voice: will have been fixed

sentences.english: By our next sync, I will have updated the documentation.
sentences.hindi: हमारे अगले sync तक, मैं documentation update कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By our NEXT SINK, I will have up-DAY-tid the dok-yoo-men-TAY-shun.

drills.practiceNotes: Team member responses — professional commitment और reliability दिखाएं।

drills.title: Roleplay — Job Interview (Future Plans)
drills.instructions: Interviewer के सवालों का confident जवाब दें।

sentences.english: By the time I complete my probation, I will have understood all the processes.
sentences.hindi: Probation period के अंत तक, मैंने सभी processes समझ ली होंगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME I com-PLEET my pro-BAY-shun, I will have un-dur-STOOD ALL the PRO-ses-iz.

sentences.english: In 2 years with this company, I will have contributed to multiple successful projects.
sentences.hindi: इस company में 2 साल में, मैं कई successful projects में contribute कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: In TWO years with this KUM-puh-nee, I will have kon-TRIB-yoo-tid to MUL-tih-pul suk-SES-ful PRO-jekts.

sentences.english: By the end of this year, I will have earned my cloud computing certification.
sentences.hindi: इस साल के अंत तक, मैंने cloud computing certification ले ली होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By the END of this YEAR, I will have URND my KLOWD kom-PYOO-ting sur-tif-ih-KAY-shun.

sentences.english: By the time I leave this role, I will have trained my successor.
sentences.hindi: इस role छोड़ने तक, मैंने अपने successor को train कर दिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME I LEEV this ROHL, I will have TRAYND my suk-SES-ur.
sentences.tip: successor = the next person to take your role

sentences.english: In 5 years, I will have grown into a leadership position.
sentences.hindi: 5 सालों में, मैं leadership position तक पहुँच चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: In FIVE years, I will have GROHN in-too a LEED-ur-ship po-ZI-shun.

drills.practiceNotes: Interview में Future Perfect दिखाता है कि आप results-oriented हैं।

drills.title: Roleplay — Interviewer Asks, You Answer
drills.instructions: Interviewer का question सुनें, confident answer दें।

sentences.english: Q: Where do you see yourself in 5 years? A: In 5 years, I will have become a product manager.
sentences.hindi: Q: 5 साल में आप खुद को कहाँ देखते हैं? A: 5 सालों में, मैं product manager बन चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: In FIVE years, I will have be-CUM a PRO-dukt MAN-ih-jur.

sentences.english: Q: What will you achieve in 3 years? A: By then, I will have led at least 2 major product launches.
sentences.hindi: Q: 3 सालों में क्या achieve करेंगे? A: तब तक, मैं कम से कम 2 major product launches lead कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By THEN, I will have LED at LEEST TOO MAY-jur PRO-dukt LAUN-chiz.

sentences.english: Q: Will you have finished your degree before joining? A: Yes, by June, I will have completed my degree.
sentences.hindi: Q: Join करने से पहले degree पूरी कर लेंगे? A: हाँ, June तक, मैंने degree पूरी कर ली होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: YES, by JOON, I will have com-PLEE-tid my de-GREE.

sentences.english: Q: How long will it take to learn our tech stack? A: Within 3 months, I will have mastered your core technologies.
sentences.hindi: Q: Tech stack सीखने में कितना समय लगेगा? A: 3 महीनों में, मैंने आपकी core technologies master कर ली होंगी।
sentences.pronunciation: With-IN THREE munths, I will have MAS-terd your KOR tek-NOL-uh-jeez.
sentences.tip: tech stack = set of programming technologies

sentences.english: By the end of my first year, I will have built strong relationships with all key stakeholders.
sentences.hindi: पहले साल के अंत तक, मैंने सभी key stakeholders के साथ strong relationships बना ली होंगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By the END of my FURST YEAR, I will have BILT STRONG re-LAY-shun-ships with ALL KEE STAYK-hohl-durz.

drills.practiceNotes: Confident interview answers = clear subject + will have + strong V3 + specific timeframe।

drills.title: Roleplay — Planning a Trip Together
drills.instructions: दो दोस्त trip plan कर रहे हैं। Natural conversation style।

sentences.english: By the time we reach Goa, we will have driven for 8 hours.
sentences.hindi: Goa पहुँचने तक, हम 8 घंटे drive कर चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME we REECH GOH-uh, we will have DRIV-en for AYT OW-urz.

sentences.english: By Monday, I will have booked the hotel and confirmed the flights.
sentences.hindi: Monday तक, मैंने hotel book कर लिया होगा और flights confirm कर ली होंगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By MUN-day, I will have BOOKT the hoh-TEL and kon-FURMD the FLYTS.

sentences.english: Will you have packed your bags by Sunday evening?
sentences.hindi: क्या रविवार शाम तक आपने bags pack कर लिए होंगे?
sentences.pronunciation: Will you have PAKT your BAGZ by SUN-day EEV-ning?

sentences.english: By the time we return, we will have visited 5 different places.
sentences.hindi: वापस आने तक, हम 5 अलग-अलग जगहें देख चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME we re-TURN, we will have VIZ-ih-tid FIVE DIF-runt PLAY-siz.

sentences.english: By next week, I'll have arranged everything for the trip.
sentences.hindi: अगले हफ्ते तक, मैंने trip के लिए सब कुछ arrange कर लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By NEXT week, I-ul have uh-RAINJD EV-ree-thing for the TRIP.

drills.practiceNotes: Travel conversations में Future Perfect = आप planning और excitement दोनों express कर सकते हैं।

drills.title: Roleplay — Family Planning Future Goals
drills.instructions: Family के साथ future plans discuss करें।

sentences.english: By the time my son is 18, I will have saved enough for his education.
sentences.hindi: मेरे बेटे के 18 साल होने तक, मैंने उसकी education के लिए पर्याप्त बचाया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME my SUN is AY-teen, I will have SAVED e-NUFF for his ed-yoo-KAY-shun.

sentences.english: By 2027, we will have moved to a bigger house.
sentences.hindi: 2027 तक, हम एक बड़े घर में shift हो चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By TWO-O-TWEN-tee-SEV-en, we will have MOOVD to a BIG-ur HOWS.

sentences.english: By the time my parents retire, I will have set up my own business.
sentences.hindi: मेरे माता-पिता के retire होने तक, मैंने अपना business शुरू कर लिया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME my PAR-ents re-TIRE, I will have SET up my OWN BIZ-nes.

sentences.english: Will you have finished your course before the wedding?
sentences.hindi: क्या शादी से पहले आपने course पूरा कर लिया होगा?
sentences.pronunciation: Will you have FIN-isht your KORSE be-FORE the WED-ing?

sentences.english: By the time we celebrate our anniversary, we will have achieved all our goals.
sentences.hindi: Anniversary मनाने तक, हमने अपने सभी goals हासिल कर लिए होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME we SEL-uh-brayt our an-ih-VUR-suh-ree, we will have uh-CHEEVD all our GOHLZ.

drills.practiceNotes: Family context में Future Perfect = long-term commitments और responsibilities।

drills.title: Speed Drill — Rapid Fire Future Perfect
drills.instructions: जितनी जल्दी हो सके, clearly बोलें। हर sentence के बाद pause करें। Timer: 30 seconds per sentence।

sentences.english: By tomorrow, I will have done it.
sentences.hindi: कल तक, मैं यह कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By to-MOR-row, I will have DONE it.
sentences.tip: Shortest form — done = do का V3

sentences.english: By then, she will have left.
sentences.hindi: तब तक, वह जा चुकी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By THEN, she will have LEFT.

sentences.english: By 2030, I will have achieved my goals.
sentences.hindi: 2030 तक, मैंने goals हासिल कर लिए होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By TWO-O-THUR-tee, I will have uh-CHEEVD my GOHLZ.

sentences.english: Will you have finished by Friday?
sentences.hindi: क्या शुक्रवार तक खत्म हो जाएगा?
sentences.pronunciation: Will you have FIN-isht by FRY-day?

sentences.english: By then, they won't have arrived.
sentences.hindi: तब तक, वे नहीं पहुँचे होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By THEN, they WONT have ar-RIVED.

sentences.english: By the time you read this, I will have left.
sentences.hindi: जब तक तुम यह पढ़ो, मैं जा चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By the TIME you READ this, I will have LEFT.

sentences.english: By next year, she'll have become a manager.
sentences.hindi: अगले साल तक, वह manager बन चुकी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By NEXT year, sheel have be-CUM a MAN-ih-jur.

sentences.english: We'll have completed it before the deadline.
sentences.hindi: Deadline से पहले हम इसे complete कर चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: Weel have com-PLEE-tid it be-FORE the DEED-line.

sentences.english: By 5 PM, I'll have sent the email.
sentences.hindi: शाम 5 बजे तक, मैं email भेज चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By FIVE PEE-EM, I-ul have SENT the EE-mayl.

sentences.english: By 2025, he'll have bought a car.
sentences.hindi: 2025 तक, उसने car खरीद ली होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By TWO-O-TWEN-tee-FIVE, heel have BAWT a KAR.

drills.practiceNotes: Speed drill के बाद, फिर से slowly practice करें। Speed comes with consistency! 🔥
